questions.question:
Which of the following statements about ERP systems is true?



IS&Software Engineering: UGC NET CSE | November 2017 | Part 2 | Question: 47
options: Most ERP software implementations fully achieve seamless integration
ERP software packages are themselves combinations of separate applications for manufacturing, materials, resource planning, general ledger, human resources, procurement and order entry
Integration of ERP systems can be achieved in only one way
An ERP package implemented uniformly throughout an enterprise is likely to contain very flexible connections to allow charges and software variations
questions.correct_answer: ERP software packages are themselves combinations of separate applications for manufacturing, materials, resource planning, general ledger, human resources, procurement and order entry
